title: 4 Pack Garden Hose Connector, Solid Brass Tap Connector, 1/2 Inch and 3/4 Inch 2-in-1 Faucet Connector, 1/2 Inch Quick Connect Garden Hose Fittings, Thread Easy Connect Faucet Adapter
features: Made of high-quality brass material, our hose connector is strong, durable, and rustproof, guaranteeing an extended lifespan compared to plastic fittings. Suitable for 3/4 inch tap or faucet threads, along with a quick connector for 1/2" DN15 Hosepipe.
Easy installation with inside and outside threads for quick and tool-free connection, ensuring a seamless connection between tap and hose.
Versatile usage for washing machines, BSP garden hoses, water pipes, and other appliances that require a water supply, providing a reliable alternative to plastic fittings.
Each package includes two pieces of 3/4 or 1/2 inch tap faucet threadsand two pieces of 1/2 inch garden hose tap quick connectors.
Upgrade your hose fittings to brass for a leak-proof and secure connection – ideal for those seeking a long-lasting and reliable solution.
description: Hydrogarden Garden Hose Connector, Solid Brass Tap Connector, 1/2 Inch and 3/4 Inch 2-in-1 Faucet Connector, 1/2 Inch Quick Connect Garden Hose Fittings, Thread Easy Connect Faucet Adapter (4 Pack)

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎Two sets 3/4 or 1/2 inch tap faucet connector and 1/2 inch garden hose tap quick connectors
